assertions.title: Bundled skill discovery publishes only renamed skill slugs

steps.expected: Only renamed bundled skill slugs are listed.

steps.action: Fetch renamed bundled skill routes directly

steps.expected: Legacy routes do not resolve and return 4xx.

evidence.network: GET /api/skills/index -> 200; GET /api/skills/papierklammer -> 200; GET /api/skills/papierklammer-create-agent -> 200; GET /api/skills/papierklammer-create-plugin -> 200; legacy GET /api/skills/paperclip* -> 404.
evidence.legacyTokenCheck: Index contains only renamed slugs=True; legacy /api/skills/paperclip* all 4xx=True.

assertions.title: Served bundled skill markdown is renamed end-to-end

steps.action: Fetch renamed bundled skill markdown routes
steps.expected: Bundled skill markdown is served from renamed routes.

steps.action: Scan fetched markdown for legacy branding and legacy skill-route examples
steps.expected: No fetched markdown teaches paperclipai, Paperclip, or legacy bundled skill names/routes.

assertions.title: Legacy skill refs and legacy adapter aliases are rejected

steps.expected: Baseline canonical adapter and skill snapshot is observable.
steps.observed: Agent detail returned HTTP 200 with adapterType=codex_local; skills snapshot returned HTTP 200.

steps.action: POST legacy desiredSkills=["paperclip"] to the live skill-sync surface
steps.expected: The legacy bundled skill ref is rejected with 4xx rather than silently canonicalized.
steps.observed: POST /api/agents/7e46ba35-1e81-4a37-a5d6-65469bc6059f/skills/sync returned HTTP 422 with body {"error":"Legacy bundled skill references are no longer supported. Use renamed skill slugs instead (paperclip → papierklammer)."}.

steps.action: Fetch the live skill snapshot again after the rejected mutation
steps.expected: Observable agent skill state remains unchanged after the rejected legacy request.
steps.observed: Follow-up GET /api/agents/7e46ba35-1e81-4a37-a5d6-65469bc6059f/skills returned HTTP 200; JSON unchanged=True.

steps.action: Inspect the validated live responses for any legacy adapter alias relevant to this area
steps.expected: If a legacy adapter alias is discoverable, it can be probed; otherwise the absence is recorded with evidence.
steps.observed: Validated live responses exposed canonical adapterType=codex_local and no legacy adapter alias field or alias value was discoverable.

evidence.network: GET /api/agents/7e46ba35-1e81-4a37-a5d6-65469bc6059f -> 200; GET /api/agents/7e46ba35-1e81-4a37-a5d6-65469bc6059f/skills -> 200; POST /api/agents/7e46ba35-1e81-4a37-a5d6-65469bc6059f/skills/sync desiredSkills=["paperclip"] -> 422; follow-up GET /api/agents/7e46ba35-1e81-4a37-a5d6-65469bc6059f/skills -> 200.
evidence.legacyTokenCheck: Legacy skill ref rejected with 4xx=True; follow-up snapshot unchanged=True; no live legacy adapter alias discoverable in validated responses.

assertions.title: Available-skill and adapter guidance text uses renamed managed-skill wording

steps.expected: Available-skill discovery uses the renamed managed-skill field/key names.
Adapter guidance labels and reasons use renamed Papierklammer wording.
steps.observed: /api/agents/7e46ba35-1e81-4a37-a5d6-65469bc6059f/skills returned HTTP 200; banned text token matches=[].

steps.action: Scan the validated outputs for legacy managed-skill wording leaks
steps.expected: Validated outputs do not leak isPaperclipManaged, [paperclip], or Paperclip-branded guidance text.
